title: Convicted Rapist Who Fled to Scotland and Faked His Own Death Dies in Utah
summary_full: Nicholas Rossi, 38, raped two girlfriends in 2008 and later fled to Scotland, prosecutors said. An attentive nurse treating him for Covid in 2021 identified him.
